arts.sum: Hansi Flick confident on Ansu Fati's Barcelona return - Football España Barcelona have a number of contract discussions to consider over the next 12 months, but in a clear show of their faith in him, Pedri’s agents appear to be the first they have contacted over a new deal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea hope to sign star amid Barcelona’s financial issues
arts.sum: Chelsea are hoping to tempt Barcelona into the sale of Jules Kounde as the Blues look to capitalise on the economic issues in Catalonia. Barcelona’s challenging financial situation means sales could be required to fund further transfer business, with the Spanish side having had to offload players to register new recruit Dani Olmo this summer. […] The post Chelsea hope to sign star amid Barcelona’s financial issues first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'learn' asking price for midfield target
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven allegedly place a valuation of around €35m (£29m) on Barcelona-linked midfielder Jerdy Schouten.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Barcelona extend invitation to 15-year-old Mexican wonder kid watched by Man City
arts.sum: FC Barcelona have extended an invitation for Club Tijuana’s rising star, Gilberto Mora, to visit their renowned youth academy, La Masia. The 15-year-old forward has been making waves in the Mexican league, becoming the youngest player in history to start in the first eleven and score a goal at just 15 years and 320 days […] The post Exclusive: Barcelona extend invitation to 15-year-old Mexican wonder kid watched by Man City appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a big game for us’ - Marcelino relishing taking on Barca & Yamal
arts.sum: Barca head into the match top of the league and face a Villarreal side who have also enjoyed a start season and are looking forward to the game. We are playing against a great team, the best in the league at the moment.
